entities.boy: a boy holding a puzzle piece
entities.girl: a girl holding the matching piece

scenes.title: The Puzzle
scenes.background_prompt: A carpeted living room floor with a large jigsaw puzzle spread out, a coffee table pushed aside, couch cushions on the floor, and warm lamplight. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A carpeted living room floor with warm lamplight. A large jigsaw puzzle depicting a tropical beach is spread across the floor, nearly complete — a hole of about two pieces remains in the center showing the beach's missing sun. A boy of about seven in a blue t-shirt kneels on one side, holding a puzzle piece in his right hand — the left half of the sun. A girl of about the same age in a pink t-shirt kneels on the opposite side, holding the matching piece — the right half of the sun. They look at each other with excited recognition, both realizing their pieces fit together. Couch cushions have been tossed on the floor for comfort. A coffee table is pushed against the wall to make room. The puzzle box with the completed image sits propped against the couch for reference.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place boy kneeling on one side of the puzzle, holding a puzzle piece (left half of sun) in right hand. Place girl kneeling on the opposite side, holding the matching piece (right half of sun). Both looking at each other with excited recognition.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, four loose jigsaw puzzle pieces lie scattered on a textured brown carpet; one piece depicts a blue sky with a cloud, another shows white flowers on grass, and two others show parts of a landscape. In the center foreground, a large, rectangular jigsaw puzzle is partially assembled on the carpet, showing a scene with trees, flowers, and a blue sky. A boy with curly brown hair, wearing a yellow long-sleeved shirt, green pants, and blue sneakers with white soles, is kneeling on the left side of the puzzle. He is smiling and holding a puzzle piece featuring a bright yellow sun. To his right, a girl with long, wavy brown hair, wearing a green long-sleeved dress with a white collar and blue socks, is kneeling on the carpet. She is smiling and holding a puzzle piece that shows a yellow crescent moon. To the right of the girl, three large, plush pillows are stacked on the carpet: a yellow-and-tan striped pillow, a reddish-orange pillow, and a blue striped pillow in the bottom right corner. Behind the children, the floor is made of light brown wood. On the far left, a large open doorway or window reveals an outdoor scene with green rolling hills, several leafy green trees with brown trunks, a light blue sky with soft white clouds, and a grassy field with small white and yellow flowers. In the center background, a tall floor lamp with a thin brown stand and a large, flared beige lampshade stands behind the girl. On the light-colored wall behind the lamp, a small wooden shelf holds several books with red, blue, and green spines. To the right of the lamp, a low wooden bench sits against the wall, and the bottom corner of a dark-framed picture is visible on the wall above it. The entire scene is bathed in warm, soft light, indicating a bright daytime setting indoors.
